title: MOM COMES HOME — surprise reveal
prompt: Whole family at the front door of cozy anniversary living room with twinkling fairy lights and heart-shaped balloons, surprise reveal moment. @Mama center frame just stepped through, hand COVERS mouth in surprise, eyes WIDEN happy. @Papa LEFT-CENTER. @Sara far LEFT. @Eva far RIGHT. All three with arms wide open in celebration. All smiling huge joyful surprise expressions. Whole household together (joyful): "SURPRISE! HAPPY ANNIVERSARY!"
